title: selaginella kurzii
intro: Selaginella kurzii, also known as the Indian spikenard or kurz's spike moss, is a type of small, terrestrial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting respiratory health. Selaginella kurzii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
